product: ai_classify and ai_extract now support v2 signatures (Public Preview)
tagline: The ai classify and ai extract AI Functions now support new v2 signatures with improved quality and performance, greater flexibility, and native composability with ai parse document to power end to…
what_it_does: The ai classify and ai extract AI Functions now support new v2 signatures with improved quality and performance, greater flexibility, and native composability with ai parse document to power end to end document processing workflows. Applies to: Databricks SQL Databricks Runtime The ai extract() function extracts structured data from text and documents according to a schema you provide. You can use simple field names for basic extraction, or define complex schemas with nested objects, arrays, type validation, and field descriptions for business documents like invoices, contracts, and financial filings.
why_it_matters: The ai classify and ai extract AI Functions now support new v2 signatures with improved quality and performance, greater flexibility, and native composability with ai parse document to power end to end document processing workflows.
